{{CargoRelic
|name=Fuel Cell
|class_id=20301
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Also called an Electrochemical Generator, it converts chemical energy from fuel into electricity cleanly and efficiently.
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=20
|tech=27
|ss1=Minion Cloning SPD +0.6%
|ss2=Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|ss3=Minion Cloning SPD +1.8%
|ss4=Minion Cloning SPD +1.8%
|ss7=Minion Cloning SPD +1.8%<br> (Awakened)
}}
